title: The Escape from Alabasta Begins
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on vivi speaks to her country. Vivi stands before Alabasta and chooses her duty as princess, even as her heart remains tied to the friends who saved her.
scene: This scene belongs to the Vivi Speaks to Her Country sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Smoker, Narrator, Vivi, Nami, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Smoker! What's with this sudden rain!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I know what is and isn't illegal.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...Pardon Hina. Hina reflects for baseless accusation.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Just to search for one puny ship...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Marine HQ Captain "Hina the Black Cage"

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah, I'm already aware of that.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I will not allow any- body...

summary: Vivi stands before Alabasta and chooses her duty as princess, even as her heart remains tied to the friends who saved her.
